title: KIND does not seem to work with podman
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

Pulling `KIND` images seems not to work

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Running `kind create cluster`, I get:

```
kind create cluster
Creating cluster "kind" ...
 ✗ Ensuring node image (kindest/node:v1.18.2) 🖼 
ERROR: failed to create cluster: failed to pull image "kindest/node:v1.18.2@sha256:7b27a6d0f2517ff88ba444025beae41491b016bc6af573ba467b70c5e8e0d85f": command "docker pull kindest/node:v1.18.2@sha256:7b27a6d0f2517ff88ba444025beae41491b016bc6af573ba467b70c5e8e0d85f" failed with error: exit status 125
Command Output: Error: invalid image reference "kindest/node:v1.18.2@sha256:7b27a6d0f2517ff88ba444025beae41491b016bc6af573ba467b70c5e8e0d85f"
```

OK, now going back a step and trying to just pull the image..., like:

2. Run `docker pull kindest/node:v1.18.2@sha256:7b27a6d0f2517ff88ba444025beae41491b016bc6af573ba467b70c5e8e0d85f`

same 

I use the `podman docker` thing.  Running `podman pull ....` gives the SAME error, FWIW

**Describe the results you received:**

You will get: 

```
Error: invalid image reference "kindest/node:v1.18.2@sha256:7b27a6d0f2517ff88ba444025beae41491b016bc6af573ba467b70c5e8e0d85f"
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

A functioning download of the image

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version
Version:      2.0.4
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.14.6
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64

```

comments.body: I guess this is a dup of https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/6721  ?

@matzew: Closing this issue.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7243#issuecomment-669896594):

>/close


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
